_README: Phase 8 gold retrieval fixtures (P8-T8). The vectors below are DETERMINISTIC SYNTHETIC embeddings pinned as model 'synthetic-hash-v1', produced by eval/fixtures/regen_retrieval_gold.py's documented seeded concept-projection -- NOT a real embedding model. They exist to wire the gold-eval harness and to prove the lexical-anchor subset does NOT regress under hybrid fusion. REAL-MODEL vectors REPLACE these the moment an embedding endpoint is first configured: re-run the regen script against the live /embeddings API and re-pin the model id. Do not read these synthetic vectors as a measurement of real paraphrase recall.
holdout_rule: every 5th query_id (5,10,15,20,25) is the Phase 6 hold-out, excluded from ALL P8 tuning (P8S-12)

corpus.text: Total headcount across all departments stands at 412 as of Q2.
Annual recurring revenue reached 18.4 million dollars this fiscal year.
Logo churn for the enterprise segment was 4.1 percent last quarter.
At the current burn the company has 22 months of cash runway remaining.
The p99 API response latency measured 240 milliseconds under peak load.
Service availability for the quarter met the 99.95 percent SLA target.
The Growth subscription tier is billed at 299 dollars per seat monthly.
New customers complete activation through a six-step guided setup flow.
The support helpdesk resolved 1320 escalation tickets in March.
An encryption-at-rest control closed the outstanding compliance finding.
The EMEA territory contributed 38 percent of bookings this period.
The roadmap targets a vector-search feature launch in the next release.
Invoice INV-2024-00731 was settled net-30 against purchase order PO-5582.
Error code ERR_QUOTA_4290 indicates the embedding batch exceeded its limit.
SKU GRW-SEAT-299 maps to the Growth per-seat monthly entitlement.
